mapper.select: SELECT no, content_id AS contentId, title, content_type_id AS contentTypeId, area_code AS areaCode, si_gun_gu_code AS siGunGuCode, first_image1 AS firstImage1, first_image2 AS firstImage2, map_level AS mapLevel, latitude, longitude, tel, addr1, addr2, homepage, overview FROM attractions WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.update: UPDATE attractions SET content_id = #{contentId}, title = #{title}, content_type_id = #{contentTypeId}, area_code = #{areaCode}, si_gun_gu_code = #{siGunGuCode}, first_image1 = #{firstImage1}, first_image2 = #{firstImage2}, map_level = #{mapLevel}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, tel = #{tel}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2}, homepage = #{homepage}, overview = #{overview} WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.select: SELECT no, content_id AS contentId, title, content_type_id AS contentTypeId, area_code AS areaCode, si_gun_gu_code AS siGunGuCode, first_image1 AS firstImage1, first_image2 AS firstImage2, map_level AS mapLevel, latitude, longitude, tel, addr1, addr2, homepage, overview FROM attractions ORDER BY no DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT sido_code AS sidoCode, sido_name AS sidoName FROM sidos ORDER BY sido_code
SELECT sido_code AS sidoCode, gugun_code AS gugunCode, gugun_name AS gugunName FROM guguns WHERE sido_code = #{sidoCode} ORDER BY gugun_code
